mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.real_name as create_user_name FROM sales_order o LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.create_user = u.user_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_order(order_no, total_amount, create_user) VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{totalAmount}, #{createUser})
mapper.select: SELECT i.*, p.product_name FROM sales_order_item i LEFT JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_order_item(order_id, product_id, quantity, price, amount) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{amount})
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM sales_order WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') as date, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount FROM sales_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') as date, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount FROM sales_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d')
SELECT o.*, u.real_name as create_user_name FROM sales_order o LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.create_user = u.user_id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
